label: LUC — Locale Universal Calculator
description: Multi-locale financial calculator engine. Currency conversion, cost-of-living, K1 taxation (North America), Zakat/VAT (Saudi/MENA). Foundation built from Flip Secrets real estate calculator. Gates all billable actions via canExecute(). This is the authoritative LUC implementation — AIMS/luc/ and AIMS/aims-tools/luc/ are adapters that call this engine.

chatIcon.rule: ACHEEVY Helmet is the ONLY primary chat avatar. LUC calculation UIs show ACHEEVY as narrator with financial/calculator icon badges.

context.authoritative: This repo is the single authoritative home for LUC logic. No duplicate brains.
context.flipSecrets: LUC foundation was built from the Flip Secrets real estate calculator at aims-tools/luc/presets/real-estate-flip/
context.billingGate: Every billable action across the entire ecosystem passes canExecute() in LUC first.
context.localeV2Relationship: Locale-by-ACHIEVEMOR-2 is the consumer frontend for LUC. LUC is the engine, Locale v2 is the UI.
